message:
fix(tui): expand git history snapshot redaction to cover SHAs and dates

Renames redact_git_commit_count() to redact_git_volatile() and extends
it to also redact:
- Full commit SHAs in "SHA: " lines → "AAAAAAA"
- 7-char short SHAs in commit list lines → "AAAAAAA"
- ISO dates in "Date: " lines → "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ"

This makes history mode snapshots fully deterministic regardless of
which commits exist in the bvr repository when tests run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
